title: Worlds Together!
description: Travel dimensions with your friends, defeat bosses, and explore the world together!
body:
Explore various worlds with your friends and comrades, choose an origin, a class, and fight through myriad dimensions at your own pace. 


- A variety of Origins to choose from.
- Plenty of food to cook with Farmers' Delight and addons
- Venture into 5+ unique dimensions
- Utilize spells and skills from an assortment of classes

This pack was designed to play through slowly with people you enjoy the company of, ideally working together the whole way rather than spread out across the world to act on your own as so many servers do. The end goal is to have had a journey with your friends, not to 'finish' the pack.
